Wait numerator is 1125899906842625 (1.125e15) denominator 140,737,488,355,328 (~1.4e14). Multiply denominator by 8: 1,125,899,906,842,624. Numerator is 1,125,899,906,842,625, off by 1. So fraction is 8 + 1/140,737,488,355,328 ≈ 8.000000000000007. So it's basically 8.
